title: Technology and magic
description: A modpack that combines technology with magical and interesting mods, and has been updated with new generation mods.
body:
This modpack combines Create and IC2 technologies with magic and immersive mods. World generation is enhanced with Teralith, Nullscape, and Continents.

New structures and a mod adding improved variants of existing ones have been added, making the game more engaging.

Sodium features have been backported to Forge, improving the build process and reducing crashes for smoother gameplay.

Visuals depend on shader settings and texture packs like BettervanillaBuilding, contributing to realistic and detailed game objects and scenes.

![New generation.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9564049a63a1df5262c9cd2ff54d9a9d92b50052.png)
